body: Build the vanilla JavaScript web application for the Productivity System. Mobile-first, white-bg/black-fg only theme, data-file-first architecture, functional style, JSDoc-documented. Timeline/history-based data-table with per-project/cross-project and per-type/cross-type filters. Modal-based CRUD with filename compilation from title, type, date, and author fields. Auto-detect JSON or markdown body by entry type. Global search and tag-search for projects, tasks, notes, and logs. Git-integrated action history with rewind capability. Commit and push system functions. Hotkeys for search and create. Keyboard navigation, quick status toggle, deadline indicators, cross-reference links, diff view in history, and confirmation dialogs for destructive actions.
